detail.description: Sung-Mun Song singles on a line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Ty France scores. Jake Cronenworth scores.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Miguel Andujar scores.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a ground ball to left fielder Dominic Smith. Will Wagner scores. Rodolfo Durán to 2nd.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a line drive to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a ground ball to right fielder Blake Dunn, deflected by pitcher Tony Santillan.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a soft ground ball to first baseman Jared Young, deflected by pitcher Austin Warren.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a fly ball to center fielder A.J. Ewing.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Miguel Andujar scores. Luis Rengifo scores. Jase Bowen to 2nd.
Sung-Mun Song doubles (4) on a line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a ground ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. Luis Rengifo to 3rd.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Max Muncy.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a ground ball to shortstop Mookie Betts. Xander Bogaerts to 3rd.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a soft ground ball to first baseman Rafael Devers, deflected by pitcher Gregory Santos.

Sung-Mun Song doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Nick Castellanos scores. Luis Campusano scores. Sung-Mun Song to 3rd. Sung-Mun Song advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Willy Adames.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley.

pitches.typeDescription: Miguel Andujar caught stealing 2nd base, catcher Jhonny Pereda to shortstop J.P. Crawford.
pitches.callDescription: Miguel Andujar caught stealing 2nd base, catcher Jhonny Pereda to shortstop J.P. Crawford.

detail.description: Padres challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Sung-Mun Song singles on a ground ball to third baseman Brendan Donovan.
Sung-Mun Song homers (1) on a line drive to right center field.
Sung-Mun Song doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.
Sung-Mun Song singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker, deflected by second baseman JJ Wetherholt.
Sung-Mun Song doubles (2) on a fly ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Xander Bogaerts scores. Ty France to 3rd.
